task_frame_summary: The local review bundle is structurally disciplined, but its completeness and polish can still overstate scope certainty.
assumed_goal: Test whether the neat packaging of the review bundle hides scope inflation or borrowed completeness.
explicit_constraints: Do not imply registry or runtime progression.
Treat the bundle as review packaging, not authority.
latent_frame_risks: A clean package can look more decision-ready than it is.
Bundle completeness can hide thin justification for some scope edges.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Which part of the bundle feels settled because of packaging rather than evidence?
Where could trace-consistency be mistaken for broader authority?
frame_risk_signals: high packaging polish with bounded authority
trace-consistency can be overread as stronger endorsement
